summary.archival_abstract: Official technical documentation titled “Star Atlas Build.” This record preserves what Star Atlas Build / ATMTA publicly stated at the recorded publication time; claims about delivery, economics, or outcomes remain limited to the wording of the source.
summary.historical_value: Official evidence baseline for later reconciliation with community reporting.
summary.current_validity_warning: Official publication does not independently prove successful execution, completeness, or continued current validity.

article_text:
Royalties | Star Atlas Build
Skip to contentStar Atlas BuildSearchK
Appearance
MenuReturn to top
Royalties ​
If your project earns more than $1 million USD in lifetime Gross Revenue, here’s what happens next
Under the Star Atlas Terms of Service, if your product or service generates over $1M USD in gross revenue, you’ll need to pay royalties only on the amount beyond that threshold.
This system keeps the ecosystem fair, supports open IP acces and helps sustain ongoing development while still rewarding creators
Royalty Rates (After $1M USD Gross Revenue) ​
Industry
Product
Royalty Rate on Gross Revenue
Software
Entertainment
5%
System Application
4%
Media
Books/Comics
3%
Film
3%
Music
3%
Art
10%
Games & Figures
Board Games
2%
Figurines
5%
Card Games
7%
Apparel
Clothing
3%
Home Appliances/Decor
Home Appliances
3%
Home Decor
8%
Other
10%
These rates apply only to the revenue above your first $1,000,000 USD. (Example: If your comic generates $1.3M total, only $300k is subject to a 3% royalty.) Please note that these Royalty Rates are subject to change
What to Do If You Hit $1M+ ​
If your project passes the $1 million mark, reach out to us directly We’ll guide you through royalty reporting and next steps
Contact: legal@staratlas.com
Need a Custom License? ​
Also, you can request a custom license if the standard license terms do not make sense for your particular business model. Contact us at legal@staratlas.com to see whether a custom license might be available for your project
